installCommand: if [ -d frontend ]; then cd frontend && npm install; elif [ -d ../frontend ]; then cd ../frontend && npm install; else npm install; fi
buildCommand: if [ -d frontend ]; then cd frontend && npm run build && rm -rf ../dist && cp -R dist ../dist; elif [ -d ../frontend ]; then cd ../frontend && npm run build && rm -rf ../backend/dist && cp -R dist ../backend/dist; else npm run build; fi
